mapper.select: SELECT * FROM flower_item WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM flower_item WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flower_item (parent_id, name, description, flower_cost, time_minutes, daily_limit, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{flowerCost}, #{timeMinutes, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dailyLimit, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
